abandoned_forge.name: Abandoned Forge
abandoned_forge.text: A forge gone cold, tools still hanging. The coals could take one more flame.

choices.label: Temper a blade (+1 ATK to a random girl, permanent)

cracked_spring.name: Cracked Spring
cracked_spring.text: Clear water seeps from a fractured stone basin. There isn't much.

choices.label: The most wounded drinks deep (full heal, lowest-HP girl)

whetstone_shrine.name: Whetstone Shrine
whetstone_shrine.text: An old shrine whose altar is a worn whetstone. It asks for an offering.

choices.label: Offer blood (party loses 10% HP, ALL girls +1 ATK)
